title: Midline of sinusoidal functions from equation
description: Given the formula of a sinusoidal function, determine its midline equation.
topic_path: Midline of sinusoidal functions from equation

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is the midline equation of the function $g(x)=3\sin(2x-1)+4$?**  

$ y=$ [[☃ input-number 3]]
hints:
###Midline in sinusoids of the form $f(x)=a\sin(bx+c)+d$

Graphically, the midline of a sinusoidal function is the horizontal line that passes *exactly in the middle of its extreme values*.

The midline equation of a sinusoid of the form $f(x)={a}\sin(bx + c) + \greenD{d}$ is equal to $y=\greenD{d}$. 

 [[☃ explanation 2]]

###Finding the midline

The midline equation of $g(x) = 3\sin(2x-1)+\greenD{4}$ is $y=\greenD{4}$.
